sections.paragraph:
ῥαβδίον, ου, τό (ῥάβδος; Theophr. et al.; Ezk 21:26 v.l.) dim. of ῥάβδος a relatively light piece of wood, stick, twig Hs 8, 1, 2f; 8, 2, 9.

Theophr Theophr , IV–III b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

dim. dim. = diminutive

Hs Hs = Similitudes

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 902
